svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="d2" id="d2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-444" dy="-209" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1160" pageHeight="720" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP_CFG" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="数据安全层 · TenantAiConfigService 职责：配置存取 / 加密 / 脱敏" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="760" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CFG" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=4;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="TenantAiConfig
————
+ tenantId
+ provider / baseUrl
+ model
+ apiKeyEncrypted
+ temperature / maxTokens
+ enabled
+ rateLimitRpm
+ monthlyTokenLimit" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="220" x="60" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SVC" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=4;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="TenantAiConfigService
————
+ getConfig(tenantId) 脱敏
+ getRawConfig(tenantId) 不脱敏
+ getDecryptedApiKey(tenantId)
+ saveConfig(config)
+ isEnabled(tenantId)
+ getProvider(tenantId)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="240" x="300" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="AES" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=4;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="AesEncryptor
————
+ encrypt(plain)
+ decrypt(cipher)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="220" x="560" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MASK" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=4;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="SensitiveMasker
————
+ mask(apiKey)
 wx12****cd" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="560" y="196" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRP_FAC" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="运行时层 · TenantChatModelFactory 职责：建模型 / 缓存 / 失效" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="290" width="760" x="40" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FAC" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=4;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="TenantChatModelFactory
————
− ConcurrentHashMap cache
+ getOrCreate(tenantId)
+ evict(tenantId)
− createForTenant(tenantId)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="240" x="60" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="OPENAI" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=4;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="OpenAiChatModel
《Spring AI》
————
baseUrl + apiKey + model
DeepSeek / GLM / Qwen" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="240" x="320" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R1" edge="1" parent="1" source="SVC" style="endArrow=open;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;dashed=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" target="CFG" value="读写"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R2" edge="1" parent="1" source="SVC" style="endArrow=open;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;dashed=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" target="AES" value="落库加密 / 读取解密"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R3" edge="1" parent="1" source="SVC" style="endArrow=open;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;dashed=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" target="MASK" value="给前端时脱敏"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R4" edge="1" parent="1" source="FAC" style="endArrow=open;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;dashed=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;" target="SVC" value="取配置 / 解密 Key"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R5" edge="1" parent="1" source="FAC" style="endArrow=open;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;dashed=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;" target="OPENAI" value="构建并缓存"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 250, 252), rgb(21, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 758px; height: 1px; padding-top: 13px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 数据安全层 · TenantAiConfigService 职责：配置存取 / 加密 / 脱敏

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 210px; height: 1px; padding-top: 51px; margin-left: 30px;

div.div:
TenantAiConfig
————
+ tenantId
+ provider / baseUrl
+ model
+ apiKeyEncrypted
+ temperature / maxTokens
+ enabled
+ rateLimitRpm
+ monthlyTokenLimit

+ getProvider(tenantId)
